personalization.projectOverview: Bluebird grew from a single roastery into a name people seek out, but the site still runs on a 2019 build: a dated product catalog, a weak mobile experience, and a checkout that loses people on the third step. The goal is to rebuild the site around the catalog and shorten the path to purchase from six steps to three.
personalization.pricingDisclaimer: Photography and copywriting quoted separately. Prices exclude sales tax.
personalization.workConditions:
Payment: 50% to start per stage, 50% on acceptance · Net 15
Two revision rounds included on every stage
Design source files handed over on final payment
Warranty support: 30 days after launch
personalization.stagesJson:
[{"title":"Stage 1. Discovery & concept","costRub":6500,"rows":"Current-site audit | Analytics, heatmaps, team interviews
Competitive review | 5–7 players, teardown of the best patterns
Concept & prototype | Structure, prototypes of key screens"},{"title":"Stage 2. Design & build","costRub":18000,"rows":"Design system | Typography, color, UI kit
Page design | Up to 12 unique layouts
Build & CMS | Responsive front end, up to 3 integrations"},{"title":"Stage 3. Launch","costRub":12500,"rows":"Testing | Cross-browser and load testing
Content migration | Up to 40 pages
Team training | Video guides and a handoff call"}]
